title: chore(deps): update dependency postcss-scss to v1
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [postcss-scss](https://github.com/postcss/postcss-scss) from `v0.4.1` to `v1.0.2`

-   [`bbb2990`](https://github.com/postcss/postcss-scss/commit/bbb2990d6111a670a2008e57444a758ee95fa904) Move configs to package.json
